ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., Hotel, Office, Warehouse) */,
  "primary_property_type" TEXT /* Primary property type (e.g., Hotel, Office, Retail) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  "number_of_buildings" INTEGER /* Number of buildings in the portfolio */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the building is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the building */,
  "leed_certification" TEXT /* LEED certification status */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "last_renovation" TEXT /* Date of the last major renovation */,
  "building_occupancy" REAL /* Percentage of building occupancy */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units or rooms in the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the energy usage data belongs to */,
  "energy_star_score" INTEGER /* Energy Star score of the building */,
  "site_energy_use" REAL /* Total site energy use in kBtu */,
  "steam_use" REAL /* Steam energy use in kBtu */,
  "electricity_use" REAL /* Electricity energy use in kBtu */,
  "natural_gas_use" REAL /* Natural gas energy use in kBtu */,
  "solar_energy_use" REAL /* Solar energy use in kBtu */,
  "wind_energy_use" REAL /* Wind energy use in kBtu */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy use from renewable sources */,
  "total_energy_cost" REAL /* Total cost of energy use in dollars */,
  "electricity_cost" REAL /* Cost of electricity use in dollars */,
  "natural_gas_cost" REAL /* Cost of natural gas use in dollars */,
  "steam_cost" REAL /* Cost of steam use in dollars */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy usage record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the energy usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the emissions data belongs to */,
  "total_ghg_emissions" REAL /* Total greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons */,
  "year_of_reference" INTEGER /* Year the emissions data was referenced */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in metric tons */,
  "ch4_emissions" REAL /* CH4 emissions in metric tons */,
  "n2o_emissions" REAL /* N2O emissions in metric tons */,
  "emissions_calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate emissions */,
  "emissions_source" TEXT /* Source of emissions data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building manager, energy manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
